name: Credit Recovery Group, Inc
description_short: Houston-based credit repair firm offering dispute services, identity theft recovery, business credit consulting, and ITIN-to-SSN transition assistance with certified credit specialists.
description_long:
Credit Recovery Group, Inc. is a credit repair company based in Houston, Texas, serving clients seeking to restore damaged credit reports. The company positions itself as a full-service credit restoration firm with certified credit specialists who work directly with clients to understand their financial goals and circumstances. Their website indicates they have been in operation for at least 5 years, with customer testimonials spanning multiple years and a 4.5-star Google rating based on 19 reviews.

The company offers four primary service lines: personal credit repair (disputing inaccurate, outdated, erroneous, and unverifiable records), identity theft recovery (removing fraudulent information from credit reports), business credit consulting (helping entrepreneurs build business creditworthiness), and ITIN-to-SSN transition services (assisting individuals who have recently obtained Social Security Numbers). Their credit repair pricing is straightforward: clients pay $1 to pull their credit report, then receive a free evaluation, and choose between month-to-month plans starting at $125 for individuals or $225 for couples, with services performed monthly and billed in arrears.

The company differentiates itself through bilingual services (Spanish language support is prominently featured), personalized client relationships (emphasizing understanding individual financial goals), and a focus on the Houston/Texas market. Customer testimonials highlight specific staff members (Nubia, Soledad, Rosie, Karen Blanco) and mention rapid credit score improvements (one client reported a jump to 795 points, another achieved significant recovery in 6 months). The company maintains affiliate and client login portals and actively encourages YouTube channel subscriptions and newsletter signups.

Credit Recovery Group operates in the credit repair industry, which involves disputing items on credit reports with bureaus and creditors. While their pricing is transparent and reviews are positive, consumers should understand that credit repair services cannot remove accurate, timely, and verifiable negative items from credit reports, only disputed items. The long-term success of any credit repair service depends on which items can legitimately be challenged and the individual's subsequent credit management.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Transparent, month-to-month pricing with no automatic renewal ($125 individual/$225 couple base plans)
No payment collected until services are fully performed for each billing period
Free credit evaluation after $1 credit pull; clients can cancel anytime without penalty
Includes monthly tri-merge credit report refresh and score updates with service
Strong customer testimonials with specific named staff members and documented results
Multiple service lines beyond basic credit repair (identity theft, business credit, ITIN-to-SSN)
cons: Service limited to 180-day maximum term, which may be insufficient for complex credit issues requiring longer disputes
Website lacks specific information about dispute methodology, success rates, or typical timeline to results
No detail provided on what 'analysis and audit fee' covers or how disputes are actually filed with bureaus and creditors
Pricing structure shows discrepancies between stated amounts ($125 vs. $250 monthly noted in partial text), suggesting incomplete website documentation
Limited geographic clarity; website emphasizes Houston but unclear if they serve other states or regions
best_for: Texas residents (particularly Houston area) seeking personalized credit repair with bilingual support
Individuals recovering from identity theft who need fraudulent items removed from credit reports
Entrepreneurs building business credit profiles alongside personal credit restoration
Spanish-speaking consumers seeking credit repair services
diagnosis: Credit Recovery Group is best for Texas residents (especially Houston area) and bilingual Spanish-speaking consumers seeking personalized credit repair with transparent month-to-month pricing and no long-term commitment. The main caveat is that credit repair services cannot remove accurate, timely, and verifiable negative items—only legitimately disputed errors—and the company's website lacks specific information about dispute methodology and typical outcomes, making it important to discuss realistic expectations during the free evaluation.
services: Personal credit repair and dispute of inaccurate/outdated/erroneous records
Identity theft recovery and removal of fraudulent information from credit reports
Business credit consulting and credibility building for entrepreneurs
ITIN-to-SSN transition services and credit history transfer assistance
Free credit evaluation after initial credit report pull ($1)
Monthly tri-merge credit report refresh and score updates
Original creditor and collections account communications and validation
Month-to-month service plans with no automatic renewal
Flexible payment options (full pay or payment plans)
Newsletter signup and client account management portal
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
